title: Data Sharing Docs Source Metadata Batch 1
content_html:
Batch 1: Contract and Dependency Audit

This is the delivery specification for Batch 1 in Data Sharing Docs Source Metadata Tasks.

Batch 1: Contract and Dependency Audit

Summary: Lock the source-derived Data Sharing docs metadata contract before implementation touches readers or consumers.

ID status action
1.1 planned Audit docs-viewer/services/docs_data_sharing/package.py, docs-viewer/services/docs_export.py, docs-viewer/services/docs_import.py, Data Sharing API wrappers, and focused tests for every current docs index, by-id payload, search, recently-added, or generated artifact read.
1.2 planned Produce a field matrix for selectable records, export config field sources, hierarchy expansion, source-text extraction, returned-package review context, preview rendering, warning/error reporting, and activity metadata.
1.3 planned Lock the source-derived record shape, including doc_id, scope, title, published, summary, added_date, last_updated, parent_id, parent_title, viewable, ui_status, source_path, viewer URL only where currently exported, source-rendered content/text behavior, and content_text_length.
1.4 planned Define helper API names and ownership for the Docs Viewer-owned source metadata read model consumed by Data Sharing service code.
1.5 planned Define config-driven scope behavior: records are available for every configured Docs Viewer scope, new scopes are covered automatically, and implementation must not create scope-specific modules or repeated library/analysis blocks.
1.6 planned Define missing-source, duplicate-doc-id, unresolved-parent, source-rendering, and stale-data behavior for local Data Sharing calls.
1.7 planned Identify all tests and fixtures that currently create, read, or assert public docs index.json, manage/local generated docs index.json, generated by-id payloads, search payloads, or recently-added payloads for Data Sharing metadata.
1.8 planned Update this batch with the audit result, final record shape, helper API decision, risk notes, and handoff to Batch 2.

Steer for these tasks

  • This batch is source review and contract locking only.
  • Do not implement compatibility reads or temporary fallbacks.
  • Do not add generated metadata outputs.
  • Preserve current Data Sharing behavior, including published, UI options, package formats, selection behavior, and returned-package review workflows.
  • Treat generated publication artifacts as out of bounds even when they are local, manage-only, private, or checked in.

Deliverables

  • Audit notes in this batch document.
  • Final source-derived record shape.
  • Final helper API/owner decision.
  • List of implementation touch points and tests for Batch 2 through Batch 4.

Implementation and policy guidance

  • Use Development Checklist.
  • Keep source metadata ownership with Docs Viewer parsing/rendering helpers.
  • Keep Data Sharing as the consumer of a service helper, not a filesystem/path reconstruction layer.
  • Make direct dependency updates instead of preserving old generated-artifact reads.

Proposed verification set

  • Source audit only.
  • git diff --check if this batch updates docs.
  • No generated writes.

completed verification

  • Not started.

follow-on tasks

  • Not started.

task close

  • Add a handoff note to Batch 2.
  • Set this document and the tracker row to done when the contract is locked.
